hero.title: Giggling at the City
hero.subtitle1: Create memes and influence the urban space
hero.subtitle2: If we can laugh at the space we live in, we can also talk about it, critique it, and maybe even change it!

steps.step1Body: Upload a photo you took in the city, or choose a meme template from the collection
steps.step2Body: Add your statement with text, emoji, description, tags and location
steps.step3Title: Share, Influence and Make a Difference!
steps.step3Body: Made a meme? Share it - this time your sharing can influence the space!

whatsHappening.title: What's Going On Here?
whatsHappening.intro: This website was born from the idea that memes aren't just jokes — they're tools for communication, critique, distribution and participation. Here we're trying to use them to talk about space, about architecture, and how it looks, feels and functions in real life.

cards.whatBody: Create a meme about a space or with it - upload a photo or choose a template, add text, emojis and tags (hashtags), and of course... share!
cards.whoBody: Everyone, really! Anyone who feels they have something to say about the city can contribute. No prior knowledge needed - just a sharp eye, and a bit of humor!
cards.whyBody: The built environment affects us all, but most of the time discourse about it is closed to experts. The project examines how memes can open this discourse — and enable accessible, direct, and participatory critique.
cards.dataBody: This is academic research. All information is collected anonymously for research purposes only. For full details see
